title: Dissolution of unincorporated association
doc_html:
§512.  Dissolution of unincorporated association

An unincorporated association may be involuntarily dissolved and liquidated subject to supervision by the court, under the circumstances set forth in this Chapter.

Acts 2008, No. 877, §1.
